art_highlights: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion, driven by public auction sales (+9%)
United States leads with 44% market share, followed by UK (18%) and China (14%)
Digital art is now integral; galleries increasingly using AI for operations
Middle East emerging as key region for 2026 growth with major institutional openings
Shift toward 'transvertical' market blending fine art, luxury, and digital assets

market_summary.market_sentiment: Cautious Optimism (43% of dealers expect improvement)
market_summary.key_drivers: High-end segment resilience, return to in-person events
market_summary.trend: Prioritizing experiences over physical goods; structural adaptation of gallery models
